title: OceanVeil Streams Ingoku Danchi: Deviant's Apartment Complex Anime
content: WWWave Corporation 's new anime streaming platform OceanVeil announced on Monday that it is streaming Ingoku Danchi: Deviant's Apartment Complex , the short television anime of writer Sakusei Kenkyūjo and artist Yui Jōyama 's Ingoku Danchi (Indecent Apartment Complex) manga.
author: ANN

title: Detective Conan: Fallen Angel of the Highway Anime Film Sets New 3-Day Opening Record for Franchise
content: Comparatively, the franchise 's 28th film , Meitantei Conan: Sekigan no Flashback ( Detective Conan: One-eyed Flashback ), earned 3,438,626,700 yen (about US$24.15 million at the time) and sold 2,314,690 tickets in its first three days, and made a new opening-weekend record for the franchise last year.
author: ANN

title: Abyss Rage's Nariaki Narita Launches New Manga
content: Shueisha 's Shonen Jump+ website launched Nariaki Narita 's new manga titled Subaru the Invincible ( Muteki no Subaru) on Sunday. Shueisha 's MANGA Plus service simultaneously releases the manga in English and describes the story: Practical Karate is known as Full Contact Karate, where strikes and kicks determine the…
author: ANN

title: Mujina Into the Deep Manga Ends 1st Season, Returns with Season 2 in 2027
content: The manga's "season 1" entered its "final battle" on January 9. Viz Media is releasing the manga in English, and describes the story: Terumi Morgan bitterly accepts that he shouldn't expect a lot from life. He just wants to meet his deadlines at work and watch his porn in peace.
author: ANN

title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Crosses US$308 Million in U.S., US$628 Million Worldwide
content: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie — Nintendo , Illumination, and Universal Pictures ' sequel to The Super Mario Bros. Movie — has earned an estimated US$308,117,135 in the United States after its second weekend.
author: ANN

title: Daruma Matsuura's Steel of the Celestial Shadows Manga Returns From Hiatus
content: This year's ninth issue of Shogakukan 's Big Comic Superior magazine published the 86th and latest chapter of Daruma Matsuura 's Steel of the Celestial Shadows ( Taiyō to Tsuki no Hagane ) manga on Friday, signaling its return from a hiatus since last year.
author: ANN

title: 'Go for It, Nakamura!' Anime Casts Shunsuke Takeuchi
content: Aniplex announced a new cast member for the television anime of Syundei 's Go for It, Nakamura! ( Ganbare! Nakamura-kun!! ) boys-love manga on Monday. Shunsuke Takeuchi will join the anime's cast as Kaoru Niō, a physical education teacher at Hoshimi High School.
author: ANN

title: 5 Great Overlooked Manga That Deserve an Anime Announcement
content: The anime industry is growing ever so rapidly, and fans are always on the lookout for the next big hit. Most of the anime are based on manga, and some are even adapted from light novels and video games.
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action Tengu no Daidokoro Gets 3rd Season This Fall
content: BS-TBS announced on Monday that it is producing a third live-action season based on Ai Tanaka 's Tengu no Daidokoro (Tengu's Kitchen) manga. The new season will premiere on BS-TBS in the "Mokuyō Drama 23" time slot on Thursdays at 11:00 p.m. (10::00 a.m. EDT) this fall.
author: ANN

title: Acclaimed Shonen Anime Star Breaks Silence on Season 2 After 6 Years: “It Was a Complete Surprise to Us”
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime season is finally here, and the lineup looks as exciting as ever. Like each quarter, Crunchyroll is adding dozens of series to its library and streaming new episodes weekly after the Japanese broadcast.
author: ComicBook
